content: {"pass": false, "issues": [{"problem": "Multiple detailed claims about performance, uptime (\"hundreds of millions of monthly requests\", \"99.99% uptime\"), caching/indexing, security/privacy specifics, ecosystem integrations, and rate limits are made but the provided ledger items do not contain any supporting quotes for these specifics.", "fix": "Either add ledger items with quotes that explicitly mention these performance, reliability, security, integration, and rate‑limit details, or remove/soften those unsupported specifics."}, {"problem": "Specific pricing tier names and dollar amounts (Project $30/4,000 credits; Bootstrap $100/15,000; Startup $220/38,000; Growth $500/100,000) are asserted, but the only pricing ledger quote is high‑level and does not mention any of these plan names or prices.", "fix": "Add a ledger item quoting the pricing page that lists these plan names, prices, and credit amounts, or omit the granular tier breakdown."}, {"problem": "Claims about plan management (upgrading/changing plans any time via Billing page with pro‑rated changes) and support levels (e.g., email support on specific tiers) are not backed by any ledger quote.", "fix": "Provide ledger evidence that explicitly describes plan change mechanics and included support, or remove those details."}, {"problem": "The section on usage and rate limits (100 rpm dev keys, 1,000 rpm prod keys, separate crawl limit) relies on a source [5] that has no corresponding ledger item or quote.", "fix": "Add a ledger item with a quote from the rate‑limits help article that states these numeric limits, or delete/qualify the rate‑limit section."}]}
